data.content: Implemented ancestor-scoped terminal parent auto-resolution. Key fix from prior attempts: trigger only fires on truly terminal states (shipped/abandoned/lease_terminated), NOT deferred, which prevents the regression where deferring a child prematurely resolves the parent and breaks subsequent cascades. Uses iterative upward walk so multi-level parent chains resolve correctly. All 611 tests pass, make sanity green at 95.05% coverage. Branch: knots-bdfa-v2.
